creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=da3162c7c9f01912ba1940e188b253f2b5c7ba77

commit da3162c7c9f01912ba1940e188b253f2b5c7ba77
Author:     Kevin Bowling <kbowling@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-06-19 20:16:08 +0000
Commit:     Kevin Bowling <kbowling@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-06-22 18:53:08 +0000

    graphics/mesa-libs: Bump reverse deps for libglvnd

    Per discussion with bapt on helping pkg handle the changing of these
    deps and avoiding impossible upgrade senarios.
